use_cases: Flexible button component with multiple variants for different visual styles and purposes
Supports composition with Radix UI Slot for advanced pattern integration
Includes accessibility features like focus-visible states for keyboard navigation
Designed as a core UI primitive for form actions, CTAs, and interactive controls
Part of a carousel system for pagination dot navigation
ai_summary: A versatile Radix UI-based button component with CVA-powered styling variants. Supports default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, and link styles with multiple sizes. Includes proper accessibility features and focus states. Acts as a foundational UI element commonly used in carousel pagination dots, form submissions, and interactive controls across various interface contexts.
